narrative:
Licking County has 124,927 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.2% of registrants.
